inputs.label: Number of Steps
inputs.businessContext: Total step count from pedometer or manual tally.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total step count from pedometer or manual tally.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pedometre veya manuel sayımdan toplam adım sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtschrittzahl vom Schrittzähler oder manueller Zählung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de pas du podomètre ou du comptage manuel.

inputs.label: Step Length
inputs.businessContext: Average step length in centimeters. Typical adult range: 60–80 cm.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average step length in centimeters. Typical adult range: 60–80 cm.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Santimetre cinsinden ortalama adım uzunluğu. Tipik yetişkin aralığı: 60–80 cm.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Schrittlänge in Zentimetern. Typischer Erwachsenenbereich: 60–80 cm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur moyenne du pas en centimètres. Plage typique pour un adulte : 60–80 cm.

inputs.label: Incline
inputs.businessContext: Slope percentage. Positive for uphill, negative for downhill. 0 for flat.

businessContext_i18n.en: Slope percentage. Positive for uphill, negative for downhill. 0 for flat.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüzde cinsinden eğim. Pozitif yokuş yukarı, negatif yokuş aşağı. Düz için 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Steigungsprozentsatz. Positiv für bergauf, negativ für bergab. 0 für flach.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de pente. Positif pour la montée, négatif pour la descente. 0 pour le plat.

inputs.label: Terrain Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for terrain difficulty. 1.0 = pavement, >1 for rough ground.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for terrain difficulty. 1.0 = pavement, >1 for rough ground.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Arazi zorluğu çarpanı. 1.0 = asfalt, engebeli zemin için >1.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für Geländeschwierigkeit. 1,0 = Asphalt, >1 für unwegsames Gelände.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur de difficulté du terrain. 1,0 = trottoir, >1 pour sol accidenté.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
